concerns.text: T017 creates docs/reproducibility/dataset_counts.md but SC-001 requires validation_scope.md. T020 handles validation_scope.md, creating potential duplication. Verify both files serve distinct purposes or consolidate.
T026 outputs to docs/reproducibility/core_invariants_tabulation.md but SC-015 specifies docs/reproducibility/core_precision_consistency.md. File path mismatch between task and success criterion.

Multiple tasks contain unfilled template placeholders ({{claim:c_3ea0f57a}}, {{claim:c_afa0a894}}, {{claim:c_c70ab3de}}, {{claim:c_67f85a02}}, {{claim:c_f874ec02}}, {{claim:c_3a76cda6}}, {{claim:c_dafcb946}}) that should be resolved before task execution per analyze report.
SC-015 references FR-014 ('See FR-014') but FR-014 does not exist in spec (FRs end at FR-013). This is a spec error affecting task traceability clarity.
